summary: Iteration 24: Portfolio Accounting Bug Fix - All tests passed. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified working correctly including new stat cards (Unrealized P&L, Realized P&L, Cash Balance) and rebalance flow.
passed_tests: POST /api/custom-portfolios creates portfolio with cash_balance=0 and realized_pnl=0 initialized
GET /api/custom-portfolios/{id} returns cash_balance, realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, holdings_value
GET /api/custom-portfolios/{id} correctly computes current_value = holdings_value + cash_balance
PUT /api/custom-portfolios/{id}/rebalance preserves cost basis of kept stocks (entry_price, quantity unchanged)
PUT /api/custom-portfolios/{id}/rebalance updates realized_pnl from sold stock
After rebalance: invariant current_value ≈ holdings_value + cash_balance holds (within ₹1)
After rebalance: invariant total_pnl == realized_pnl + unrealized_pnl (within ₹1)
After rebalance: current_value does NOT reset to initial_capital (bug was wiping gains)
GET /api/custom-portfolios/{id}/history returns rebalance log with type=OUT/IN changes
OUT changes in history have realized_pnl and exit_price keys
GET /api/portfolios/xirr/{strategy_type} returns realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, cash_balance, exit_count
Frontend: CustomPortfolioDetail page shows stat-unrealized-pnl card
Frontend: CustomPortfolioDetail page shows stat-realized-pnl card
Frontend: CustomPortfolioDetail page shows stat-cash-balance card
Frontend: Rebalance button (data-testid='rebalance-btn') is clickable
Frontend: Rebalance panel (data-testid='rebalance-panel') shows stock list with remove buttons
Frontend: Save Rebalance button (data-testid='save-rebalance-btn') triggers API call
Frontend: After rebalance, stats update correctly (Unrealized P&L decreased, Realized P&L increased, Cash Balance updated)
Frontend: Holdings table (data-testid='holdings-table') shows entry/current prices, P&L%, weights
Frontend: History section (data-testid='history-section') shows tracking events
seed_data_creation: Created test portfolios during pytest runs (auto-cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified the portfolio accounting bug fix: (1) Custom portfolio rebalance now correctly tracks realized P&L when stocks are sold - sell proceeds are added to cash_balance and realized_pnl is updated. (2) The bug where current_value was reset to initial_capital after rebalance is fixed - portfolio value is now preserved across swaps. (3) Frontend CustomPortfolioDetail page at /watchlist/custom/{id} shows new stat cards: 'Unrealized P&L' (data-testid='stat-unrealized-pnl'), 'Realized P&L' (data-testid='stat-realized-pnl'), 'Cash Balance' (data-testid='stat-cash-balance'). (4) Rebalance flow via UI works: click rebalance-btn → remove/add stocks → save-rebalance-btn → stats update with non-zero cash_balance/realized_pnl. (5) History log at /api/custom-portfolios/{id}/history returns changes with type=OUT/IN and OUT changes include realized_pnl and exit_price. (6) XIRR endpoint at /api/portfolios/xirr/{strategy_type} returns realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, cash_balance, exit_count fields. Tested with 'My Growth Picks' custom portfolio - removed BAJFINANCE and verified realized P&L of +₹7.8K and cash balance of ₹4.5K were correctly tracked.
